prompt: Create a reusable Chinese fantasy jade medallion UI asset set for a bloodline crest: round medallion ring, refined jade inner ring, elegant carved face area for crest glyphs, soft integrated shadow, subtle mystical glow, premium game UI quality, designed to sit naturally inside a parchment-jade character detail page. Keep it decorative and reusable, not character-specific.
negativePrompt: black square shadow, chunky dark plaque, purple neon, sci-fi hologram, logo, text, watermark, hard rectangle card, character portrait, battle composition
postProcess: approve before moving to final runtime path
notes: This recipe replaces the current proof crest medallion. The final asset must remove the old black proof feeling and align with the jade header family.
